title: telis monantha
intro: Telis monantha, also known as the Indian staff tree, is a medicinal plant species native to the Himalayan and Southeast Asian regions. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Telis monantha include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal paste that can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations.
